summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/06/2023
DCE iron ore changed from strong to weak in the afternoon. the main contract I2309 closed 822.5. an decrease only 0.72% throughoutthe day; some traders were negative to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
